transcription.text: nobody but nobody needs a breath mint like you know who here's just a thing clorox automatic toilet cleaner it's concentrated clorox bleach in a tablet drop it in the tank every flush not only leaches away stains it also deodorizes for extra freshness so it's ball breath bye-bye clorox automatic toilet cleaner it's like a breath mint for you know who
